div.head:
No. 798
Editorial Note
div.p: On May 9, the Governments of the United States, the United Kingdom, and France sent a joint note to the Soviet Foreign Ministry requesting a reply to their tripartite note of March 13 which included the proposed text of the draft abbreviated treaty. For text of this note of May 9, see Department of State Bulletin, May 19, 1952, page 778.
